name: Fuse The Bomb
short_description: A reverse arcade where you have to make bombs and prevent the special forces from defusing it. Make life difficult for the special forces by making them play mini-games.
detailed_description:
Welcome to Fuse the Bomb, a high-stakes game of wits, strategy and sabotage! In this explosive adventure, you're not the hero defusing the bomb—you're the mastermind behind it! Are you ready to outwit the sappers and create a real time bomb? Grab your toolbox, unleash your creativity and let's dive into a world of chaos!
Fuse the Bomb is a simple game where you take on the role of a saboteur. Your task is simple, but at the same time cunning: make it as difficult as possible for sappers to defuse the bomb. At your disposal will be a whole arsenal of different modules for attaching to the bomb, each of which is designed to complicate the process of defusing it. Each module is a mini-game but you are not one playing it. Make special forces win in fun but long arcades that you need to set up and interfere with, until bomb explodes.
